seo.description: Open-source Unity Editor utilities, desktop apps, and AI tooling.

props.title: Alexey Perov
paragraphs: I build open-source developer tools — mostly for Unity, plus desktop apps and AI-assisted workflows.
My focus is practical tooling: project diagnostics, asset health checks, and utilities you can reach for every day.
Everything here is MIT or BSD-3-Clause. Contributions and issue reports are welcome.

props.heading: Featured projects
props.subheading: Start here — full catalogs are in the nav

cards.title: Unity Dependencies Hunter
cards.description: Finds unreferenced assets by scanning every file in your Unity project — run from the Tools menu or project context menu.

cards.title: Unity Missing References Hunter
cards.description: Detects missing references by scanning asset GUIDs across the project — find broken links before they surface as runtime errors or build failures.

cards.title: Unity Scanner
cards.description: Unified Editor and MCP tool for project health — dependencies, materials, shaders, Addressables, and automated CI gates.

cards.title: SpecOps
cards.description: Desktop workspace for specs, notes, and project files — folder-backed workspaces, markdown editing, and workspace-scoped AI agents.

items.title: Unity project health
items.text: Editor tools for unused assets, missing references, texture issues, shaders, Addressables layouts, and unified scanning.

items.title: Desktop tooling
items.text: Cross-platform apps built with Tauri and Svelte — workspaces, markdown editors, and utilities for everyday dev workflows.

items.title: AI-assisted workflows
items.text: MCP servers and editor integrations so assistants can run project scans, diagnostics, and batch checks on real codebases.
